title: PINECONE'S PLANETS
description: Adds new planets in our solar system! Newer updates will add some planets not from our solar system.
body:
### **PINECONES PLANETS!**
**THIS MOD ADDS IN NEW PLANETS FOR YOU TO EXPLORE!** *In the format of new dimensions using nether like portals*
PLANETS ADDED: Mars, Pluto, Uranus, Neptune, Mercury and Venus!

All planets include new blocks and biomes for you to explore!

## **LIST OF THINGS ADDED BY PLANET**

# MARS

Adds Mars stone, spawning in the mars biome.
Adds Dark Mars Stone, spawning in the mars biome.
Adds Light Mars Stone, spawning in the mars biome.
Adds fallen satelites, spawning in the mars dimension.
Adds Mars biome.
Adds Mars ignitor, crafted using a flint and steel and smooth red sandstone.

# PLUTO

Adds Pluto Stone, spawning in the pluto biome.
Adds Red Pluto Stone, spawning in the pluto biome.
Adds The Pluto Biome.
Adds Pluto Ignitor, crafted using a flint and steel and smooth quartz.

## IM NOT LISTING EVERYTHING, BUT YOU GET THE DEAL.

No new mobs were added to be as accurate to real life as possible.
